mapper.select: SELECT s.name, sc.ko, sc.en, sc.ma, sc.avg, sc.grade FROM scores sc JOIN students s ON sc.std_no = s.std_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scores (std_no, ko, en, ma, avg, grade) VALUES (#{std_no}, #{ko}, #{en}, #{ma}, #{avg}, #{grade})
mapper.select: SELECT sc.ko, sc.en, sc.ma, sc.avg, sc.grade, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sc.avg DESC) AS rank FROM scores sc WHERE sc.std_no = #{std_no}
